caption: A person with blond hair wearing a dark blue t-shirt is seen in a picture-in-picture window while playing a football video game. The gameplay occurs in a large stadium with a green field and crowds in the stands. On-screen text includes "MADDEN 23", a score of "14" and "7", and the clock showing "3rd 4:00 35". In the early part of the sequence, the screen displays a "SPECIAL TEAMS" menu with options for "RETURN MIDDLE" and "RETURN RIGHT", while a "PREVIOUS PLAY" replay shows players on the field. As the scene progresses, the menu disappears, and the view shifts to a wide shot of the field where several football players in dark uniforms stand in formation. A large purple and white "ULTIMATE TEAM" logo appears prominently across the top of the screen during the latter half of the sequence.
